description: John Zenon, a 55-year-old commercial heavy-goods vehicle driver, presents for his biennial regulatory medical clearance with severely elevated blood pressure (165/95 mmHg), daytime somnolence, and loud snoring. As the occupational health physician, record the failed fitness-for-duty examination in GNU Health, including the clinical evaluation of his blood pressure, diagnoses for essential hypertension (ICD-10 I10) and sleep apnea (ICD-10 G47.x), a prescription for an antihypertensive (Amlodipine, Lisinopril, or Losartan), and a reassessment appointment scheduled 14 to 30 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
